query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assets WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL AND estimatedValueUsd IS NOT NULL) as assets_with_coordinates,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geographicRisks) as risks_already_calculated,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT companyId) FROM assets) as companies_with_assets
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ovDZf4AdgM1wjio.bac7ad92b374 --database Rur7xAEUjvByHVg3PaP3cz --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assets WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL AND estimatedValueUsd IS NOT NULL) as assets_with_coordinates,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geographicRisks) as risks_already_calculated,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT companyId) FROM assets) as companies_with_assets
